jobs.title: AI Social Brand Videos
jobs.description:

The clips will be published on our social media channels—think Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, and X—so they must feel native to those feeds, capture attention within the first three seconds, and stay under 60 seconds.

jobs.title: Crash Test Analysis for Frame Designs
jobs.description:
What the project is
A comparative structural impact study of three lightweight occupant-cell concepts for a small side by side 2 seater urban vehicle:
1.	Tubular frame (aluminium)
2.	Monocoque frame (preferably carbon or maybe polyurethane like foam filled stuff)
3.	Hybrid redesign based on the weaknesses found in 1 and 2 
The occupants are side-by-side in every case.
The impact speed is 28 mph (45 km/h) in every case.
The impact conditions are:
•	frontal impact 
•	side impact 
The purpose is to find which concept gives the best occupant protection for a lightweight design.
skills: AnsysData AnalysisDesign OptimizationFinite Element AnalysisMaterials EngineeringMechanical DesignMechanical EngineeringSimulationStructural EngineeringTechnical Writing

jobs.title: Excel-Based Statistics Homework Help
jobs.description:
I’m working through a statistics assignment that must be solved and documented entirely in Excel, and I’d like a skilled tutor to guide me through it. The questions cover core undergraduate material—think probability concepts, simple regression, and hypothesis tests—yet everything has to be demonstrated with the appropriate Excel techniques (e.g., built-in formulas, manual calculations set up in the sheet, charts where useful).  

Here’s what I need from you:  
• A clear, walk-through solution for each problem inside one workbook, with explanatory notes that make the reasoning easy to follow.
skills: Data AnalysisData VisualizationExcelExcel VBAMathematicsRegression AnalysisStatistical AnalysisStatistics
